title: Minute-scale runtime evidence for the demo pipeline
claim: The demo scenario records minute-scale execution time for automated inventory and the full presentation pipeline.
claim_ko: 데모 시나리오는 자동 자산화와 전체 발표 파이프라인의 실행 시간을 분 단위로 기록한다.

full_pipeline_runtime_minutes.source: Discovery + Scan + Recompute timestamp duration sum

presentation_guidance: Use '6 minutes for automated inventory' when referring only to the scan-to-CBOM step.
Use '9 minutes for the full demo pipeline' when referring to discovery, inventory, and risk recompute together.
Do not present these seeded demo values as production benchmarks; real runtime depends on network latency, timeouts, selected scanners, and target count.
